summary:
**PASS** ✅

### The Needle (Bug)

**File:** `/app/app/app.py`

**The bug** was an off-by-one error in the pagination offset calculation:

```python
# BUGGY
offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)

# FIXED
offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```

The erroneous `- (1 if page > 1 else 0)` subtracted 1 from the offset for every page after page 1. This caused page 2 to start at index 9 (item ID 10) instead of index 10 (item ID 11), creating an overlap where the last item of page 1 was duplicated as the first item of page 2 — a classic off-by-one pagination bug.
